/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libautoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libautoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/autoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/autoware_msgs/msg/waypoint__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/autoware_msgs/msg/lane__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/autoware_msgs/msg/command__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/starry1n/WUTA/build/autoware_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libautoware_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
